steps.t: The Cave of the Avorrim is located in a cliff-wall overlooking the sea, on the road to Dol Amroth. Lathlorn described it in this way: 'If you follow t…
Dorthaneth is within the Cave of the Avorrim, in Belfalas.
Dorthaneth is within the Cave of the Avorrim, in Belfalas. Lathlorn has sent you to speak with Dorthaneth, the leader of the Avorrim.
Galdor is in the Cave of the Avorrim, in Belfalas.
